name: HBT Financial, Inc.
business: HBT Financial, Inc. is a bank holding company that provides a comprehensive suite of financial products and services to consumers, businesses, and municipal entities throughout Illinois and eastern Iowa.

exposures.sentence: Our loan portfolio includes loans to agricultural producers and loans secured by farmland.
Our wealth management division provides farm management services and brokers farmland sales and crop insurance throughout our markets.
We compete with non-bank financial services companies, including financial technology companies, digital asset service providers, and other financial institutions operating within the areas we serve.

The occurrence of fraudulent activity, breaches or failures of our information security controls or cybersecurity-related incidents could have a material adverse effect on our business, financial condition or results of operations.

There continues to be a rise in electronic fraudulent activity, security breaches and cyber-attacks within the financial services industry, including as a result of increasingly sophisticated methods of conducting cyber-attacks, including those employing artificial intelligence.

catalysts.event: Completion of CNB Bank Shares acquisition
catalysts.sentence: On March 1, 2026, HBT Financial completed its acquisition of CNB, the holding company for CNB Bank & Trust, N.A.

catalysts.event: Core system conversion for CNB acquisition
catalysts.sentence: The core system conversion is expected to occur in March 2026.
